in  this email. Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's 
particular  circumstances from an independent tax advisor.

Confidentiality  Notice: This communication and any attachments contain

From: "John Amerling" <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
Subject: EAR
Date: Mon, 14 Apr 2008 11:42:46 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

I spoke with Amy yesterday. She has gone over the document. She is in Miami.
This morning I confirmed that she will send her comments electronically
today. I will look for them, let you know and then put together a draft for
final review on the assumption that JEE does not have additional items. 

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)
